projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Solutions delivered with focus on efficiency and scale

item1.name: SGM — Modular General System
item1.description: Internal system for FIDC operational management. Automation of financial routines and portfolio control, resulting in a drastic reduction in manual tasks and centralization of the entire operation.

item2.name: Reversa CRM
item2.description: Custom CRM for collection and relationship management. Automates credit recovery processes and centralizes customer tracking, eliminating spreadsheets and increasing team productivity.

item3.name: Automatic Management Reports
item3.description: Data intelligence platform with automatic updates via Python. Replaces manual generation of complex reports with real-time dashboards with secure and controlled access.

item4.name: Chatbot & WhatsApp API
item4.description: Custom solution for WhatsApp automation without the need for an official API. Allows mass messaging, creation of automated flows, and integration with internal systems for service, billing, and notifications.

item5.name: Nahora — Online Scheduling
item5.description: Online scheduling system with schedule, service, and customer management. Includes automatic confirmations and reminders, plus an administrative panel for complete operational control. Reduces no-shows and organizes the service flow.

item6.name: Zapt — Distribution Management
item6.description: Internal system for distributors to control orders, inventory, and goods deliveries. Centralizes the operation, organizes processes, and reduces errors in the operational flow.

victor.bio: Specialist in automation, data, and scalable systems. Focuses on creating solutions that reduce manual operation and increase business efficiency through technology.

beatriz.bio: Specialist in interfaces and user experience, responsible for transforming complex systems into simple, intuitive, and conversion-focused applications.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Real results delivered to our partners

items.name: Lucas A.
items.text: A professional with strategic analytical capacity and focus on results, always seeking to resolve every situation in the best possible way. He is an incredible professional to work with and develops easily, always willing to help teammates with full commitment and motivation. I recommend him for the great professional he is!

items.name: MOBI FIDC
items.text: The automations developed by CODRATEC significantly reduced our manual operation time. Exceptional team with excellent communication and focus on efficiency.

items.name: Reversa Capital
items.text: The custom CRM transformed our data analysis and collection management. Clear methodology and continuous support. Trusted partners.
